name: forest
identity: A dense, snowy woodland area where the player character is currently trapped by icy vines. The environment is characterized by deep snow, pine trees, and dim lighting.
current_status: The player character is lying limp within icy vines in this forest. Two armed figures have emerged from the shadows and are approaching the player, establishing them as captives.

description.value: dense, snowy woodland with pine trees

volatile_state.current_activity: Two armed figures are emerging from the shadows and approaching the player character.
